implemented: useful SSR home page with city, age and text discovery controls
URL-driven SSR catalogue results with published place cards, preserved filters and pagination
crawlable SSR place details with address, space, pricing and amenity facts
lazy client-only MapLibre enhancement with server-rendered textual fallback
same-origin map resource route backed by the generated OpenAPI client
responsive editorial layout for desktop and mobile

architecture.dataLoading: React Router server loaders call packages/api-client through a server-only adapter
architecture.searchState: filters and pagination are encoded in URLs
architecture.mapProgressiveEnhancement: MapLibre is dynamically imported after hydration; textual place links are present in SSR HTML

results.typecheck: PASS: React Router type generation and TypeScript
results.accessibility: PASS: axe structural and semantic rules; color contrast excluded only because jsdom has no canvas implementation
results.productionSsrRuntime: PASS: home, filtered results, details and map resource
results.nonWarsawResults: PASS: Krakow filter renders through dynamic result-derived map bounds
results.desktopBrowser: PASS: two-column results and sticky map at 1280px
results.mobileBrowser: PASS: single-column controls, results and map at 390px
results.textualMapFallback: PASS: crawlable links rendered independently of map style availability

findingsClosed: map markers are tracked and removed before refresh and during unmount
initial map bounds and center derive from the first filtered result rather than a Warsaw-only constant
test cleanup prevents duplicate landmarks between accessibility cases
pagination links preserve the active URL filter state
invalid optional map-provider configuration leaves the SSR textual fallback usable
knownLimitations: MapLibre is intentionally a large lazy chunk; it is not part of initial SSR execution
automated jsdom accessibility checks cannot evaluate computed color contrast
the configured test map style URL is intentionally non-resolving and produces expected browser network errors when interactive map loading is exercised
C3 authentication and community features remain outside this checkpoint
nextAction: Commit and push C2C, verify the remote SHA, then run C2D review and certification without implementing C3.
